heading: Cooperation by Secretary of Agriculture with Territories and other possessions
label: 568a Cooperation by Secretary of Agriculture with Territories and other possessions
text: The Secretary of Agriculture is authorized to cooperate with Territories and other possessions of the United States on the same terms and conditions as with States under sections 566, 567, and 568 of this title.1See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextSections 566 and 567 of this title, referred to in text, were repealed by , , .Pub. L. 95–313, § 13(a)(1)92 Stat. 374July 1, 1978
amendments: References in TextSections 566 and 567 of this title, referred to in text, were repealed by , , .Pub. L. 95–313, § 13(a)(1)92 Stat. 374July 1, 1978
